description: You are a Quality Control analyst for a football team. Format the Week 8 scouting report for the Wildcats (/home/ga/Documents/wildcats_scouting_report.odt) according to the style guide at /home/ga/Desktop/scouting_report_style.txt. Apply Heading 1 and Heading 2 styles to designated sections, convert playmaker data into two structured tables, format specified lists, justify body text, and selectively bold strategic play concepts without bolding entire paragraphs. Save the document when complete. Calligra Words is already open with the document loaded.

expected_list_items: High frequency of play-action on first down
They go for it on 4th and short inside our 40
Heavy blitz tendency on 3rd and long
Stop the run on early downs
Limit explosive plays in the passing game
body_samples: The Wildcats run a spread offensive system
They base out of a 4-2-5 alignment
Their kicker has a strong leg
